_note: F-score = Piotroski 9-check financial health from the two most recent common fiscal years. Valuation z = today's P/E / P/S / P/B vs this name's own ~4y weekly ratio history (split-adjusted, +90d filing lag; residual dividend-adjustment drift accepted). Ladder rungs = the 200WMA and the p50/p10 of this name's last-10y weekly close depths below it. Descriptive, not advice.
